title: Enable golangci-lint and codespell in CI and various CI and Makefile improvements
body:
#### What type of PR is this?


 /kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

run golangci-lint and codespell as part of CI and many more small Makefile tweaks, see commits

#### How to verify it

check CI logs
